prompt: DevBoss cron: agenda-first Todoist-driven continuation; evaluate end-to-end-loop on available provided repos in read-only/dry-run mode; prefer gh admin auth but no destructive/admin/release/merge/secret actions; target tdrrecherche local worktree when named GitHub repos are not resolvable.
commands_or_evidence: Todoist CLI discovery: command -v todoist|todoist-cli|td returned no Todoist command; proceeded from cron agenda supplied in prompt.
gh api user --jq .login -> tiddeman83; gh repo list tiddeman83 -> 17 repos, but not bloonbladmaker/tdrrecherche/Schoolanalyse.
gh repo view tiddeman83/{bloonbladmaker,tdrrecherche,Schoolanalyse} -> GraphQL repository not resolved for all three slugs.

Target repo state: /opt/data/worktrees/tdrrecherche/feat-complete-wordpress-design-samples clean on feat/complete-wordpress-design-samples at bde99b7; /opt/data/repos/tdrrecherche clean on main at f45b2c9.
Read PROJECT_STATE.md: worktree is a design sampler plus starter WordPress scaffold; no deploy; PHP/WordPress/client access not available; client design/contact/legal decisions still needed.

HTMLParser audit over main sampler and five variant exports -> no duplicate IDs, no broken internal anchors, no missing local img assets; all six pages still have placeholder contact forms with action '#' or empty action.
Form counts: main index forms=5 placeholder_forms=5 inputs=19 buttons=10; variants A-D forms=1 placeholder_forms=1 inputs=4 buttons=1; variant E forms=1 placeholder_forms=1 inputs=3 buttons=1.

Local HTTP smoke on port 8765 -> /, /prototypes/variant-a/, /prototypes/variant-e/, /wordpress-theme/tdr-recherche/assets/css/theme.css, /wordpress-theme/tdr-recherche/assets/js/theme.js all returned HTTP 200.
Refined credential scan over target worktree for ghp_, github_pat_, BEGIN PRIVATE KEY, TODOIST_API, FIREBASE_TOKEN -> [] hits.
PHP gate: command -v php returned no php binary; php -l not run.
GitHub remote/API gates: git ls-remote origin -> HTTP 403 Write access to repository not granted; gh pr list -> GraphQL repo not resolved; gh run list -> HTTP 404 Not Found.

gh copilot --help -> wrapper available and reports possible auto-download to /opt/data/.local/share/gh/copilot; no Copilot review invoked because target repo API access is blocked and install/download was not in dry-run scope.
git diff --check && git status --short in target worktree -> exit 0 and no output; target remained clean.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Repo state and memory/context are discovered before scenario execution.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: End-to-end-loop memory and target PROJECT_STATE.md were read; target main/worktree status and commits checked; GitHub auth identity checked as tiddeman83.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: One realistic read-only scenario is exercised with real commands.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Ran HTMLParser contact/legal readiness checks, JS syntax check, HTTP smoke, credential scan, GitHub/API availability checks, and target git cleanliness checks.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: The loop does not claim production/deploy readiness when contact/legal/runtime gates are missing.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Classified outcome partial: static smoke passes, but every sampled static page has placeholder forms; WordPress contact flow is placeholder text only; PHP/WordPress runtime, CI, GitHub PR/runs, client legal/privacy decisions remain blocked/missing.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: No live deploy, destructive operation, target repo write, or target commit occurs.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: No deploy/admin/merge/release/secret actions run; target git diff/status remained clean.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Copilot/GitHub review availability is checked and recorded.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: gh auth status logged in as tiddeman83; repo/pr/run checks fail due repo resolution/404/403; gh copilot wrapper help available but full invocation skipped to avoid tool auto-download.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Changed end-to-end-loop artifacts are validated before delivery.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: This result log was written under evals/results; validation and diff checks are recorded in final report.

learning_candidates.text: Static prototype readiness must fail/partial when contact forms still use action '#' or empty action, even if HTML anchors/assets and HTTP smoke pass.
learning_candidates.reason: Durable, verified blocker pattern for static-to-production website evals; privacy-safe.

learning_candidates.text: Cron environment has no Todoist CLI command on PATH; DevBoss agenda polling needs configured Todoist tool/API or prompt-supplied tasking.
learning_candidates.reason: Operational environment fact from this run; useful but may be transient/config-specific.

copilot_findings.summary: gh copilot help is available, but a real Copilot review was not run: target repo is not visible through gh repo/pr/run APIs and invoking Copilot may install/download the CLI, which was outside read-only dry-run scope.

notes: Read-only DevBoss eval focused on contact/legal readiness of tdrrecherche static prototypes and WordPress scaffold. bloonbladmaker and Schoolanalyse remain unavailable through gh and absent locally. Target repo unchanged.
